name: beefree-sdk-vue-fastify-auth-example
description: Vue Email Builder (Beefree SDK) + Fastify Secure Authentication Example

scripts.dev: concurrently -n fastify,vite -c red,cyan "yarn workspace backend dev" "yarn workspace frontend dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n fastify,vite -c red,cyan "yarn workspace backend dev" "yarn workspace frontend dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace frontend build && yarn workspace backend build
scripts.type-check: yarn workspace frontend type-check && yarn workspace backend type-check
scripts.test: yarn workspace frontend test && yarn workspace backend test
